title: Buried for 8 Days. He Walked Out Alive.
script: Buried Alive For Eight Days? When Venezuela's twin earthquakes leveled a shopping mall in La Guaira, the whole parking structure came down — except one thing: a tiny security booth, and the guard still inside it. Hernan Gil Flores spent eight days trapped in that pocket of space while 29 feet of concrete crushed everything around him. Rescuers lowered water and nutrients down a narrow shaft just to keep him alive, talking to him through a telescopic camera while international crews from Chile, Costa Rica, the U.S., Portugal, and Mexico spent three straight days tunneling toward him. On day eight, they pulled him out alive, in what officials called a miracle. More than 2,300 people didn't make it. So what are the odds a security booth saves your life?
